event: Pittsburgh Riverhounds defeated Louisville City FC 3-1 on national CBS broadcast, with Trevor Amann scoring the fastest hat trick in USL Championship history (3:27 span).
Louisville City FC lost 3-1 at Pittsburgh, ending a six-game unbeaten run; LouCity remains 4th in Eastern Conference, 7 points behind Tampa Bay.
Charlotte Independence defeated Chattanooga Red Wolves SC 1-0 at home, with S. Marou scoring in the 13th minute.
Chattanooga Red Wolves SC fell 1-0 at Charlotte Independence, conceding a 13th-minute goal.
Fort Wayne FC defeated Greenville Triumph SC 1-0 at newly-opened Ruoff Mortgage Stadium, extending their unbeaten league run to 11 games as a first-year club.
Fort Wayne FC hosted their first match at newly-opened Ruoff Mortgage Stadium, a purpose-built home venue for the club's inaugural USL League One season.
Greenville Triumph SC lost 0-1 at Fort Wayne FC, with the club sitting at 4W-2L-7D on the season.
One Knoxville SC defeated AV Alta FC 1-0 at Covenant Health Park (T. Baker, 22'), improving to 10W-3L-2D and maintaining their position atop the league.
Spokane Velocity FC won 1-0 at Richmond Kickers via an own goal in the 10th minute, improving their record to 7W-2L-6D.
Richmond Kickers lost 0-1 at home to Spokane Velocity FC, conceding an own goal in the 10th minute; record drops to 3W-3L-9D.
New York Cosmos drew 0-0 at home with Corpus Christi FC at Hinchliffe Stadium; Cosmos sit at 3W-1L-10D on the season.
Corpus Christi FC drew 0-0 at New York Cosmos; record sits at 4W-6L-6D in their inaugural USL League One season.
Vermont Green FC defeated Ocean City Nor'easters 4-0 in the USL League Two Conference Semifinal at Virtue Field, advancing toward defense of their 2025 playoff title.
Ocean City Nor'easters were eliminated from the 2026 USL League Two Playoffs, falling 0-4 to Vermont Green FC in the Conference Semifinal.
Ventura County Fusion won 6-1 at San Francisco City FC in the Western Conference Semifinal, advancing to the Conference Final.
San Francisco City FC were eliminated from the 2026 USL League Two Playoffs, losing 1-6 at home to Ventura County Fusion in the Western Conference Semifinal.
Central Kansas United advanced to the UPSL Spring National Quarterfinals following their Round of 16 victory.
SCU Heat advanced to the UPSL Spring National Quarterfinals (scheduled July 25-26) following their Round of 16 victory.
Detroit City FC II advanced to the UPSL Spring National Quarterfinals following their Round of 16 win.
Valley 559 FC advanced to the UPSL Spring National Quarterfinals with a 4-3 extra-time victory over Provo Utah FC in the Round of 16.

North Carolina FC formally applied to join USL's new Division One league (USL Premier) targeting a 2028 launch, suspending operations from the USL Championship; application contingent on securing a minimum 15,000-seat purpose-built stadium in Raleigh.
Laredo Heat SC defeated Texoma FC in the Southern Conference Quarterfinal to earn their first USL League Two playoff win since 2013, advancing to the Conference Semifinal.
Fort Lauderdale United FC defeated Swarm FC 4-0 in the Southern Conference Quarterfinal, advancing to the Conference Semifinal.
Minneapolis City SC, who finished the regular season with a perfect record, defeated West Virginia United in the Central Conference Quarterfinal with goals from Makeem Morgan and Nathan Donovan.
